hotel_name: LaHomestay Khuất Duy Tiến (LaHomestay Khuat Duy Tien)

reviews.title: Also tired.
reviews.text: There are too many layers of gate passwords, there is also a curfew, not allowing friends to come in, difficult access for vehicles, hard to find the location, in general, it doesn't feel worth the price.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: Máy chiếu hoạt động không tốt

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great communication with host Húng, with immediate attention. Quiet building, free washer and  dryer available which was a plus. Very comfortable bed. Not located in tourist area but very accessible to Grab taxis, groceries and pharmacies. I would stay there again and do recommend.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Rất thân thiện, phản hồi nhanh, dễ tìm, thuận tiện check in, check out.

reviews.title: Really quiet, clean, and efficient building.
reviews.text: We stayed here for 1 week.  We got deluxe room and the room looked exactly like the photos, I booked that one because I need a desk for 2 computer monitors and it worked perfectly for me.  My wife and I both loved the building because the lift is very fast and the room is very clean, bed is comfortable, and its well taken care of.  There aren't any stores immediately nearby so you just need to walk in the underpass across the main street, its not a big deal at all.  It's a good trade for being away from all the noise in a very quiet building.  The wifi was the only downside, the wifi speed was not great at all, but I used my Viettel sim card hotspot and it was fine.  We might stay here again in the future for sure, I would recommend this place for either a short or long stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng siêu đẹp 😍. Đầy đủ tiện nghi, check in check out tự động. Giá cả phù hợp🤗

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The homestay is very clean and wonderful. The price is also very reasonable. Definitely worth the experience.

reviews.title: Stable, beautiful, comfortable
reviews.text: Everything is fine, the extractor hood doesn't seem to be working. But everything else is comfortable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Anh chủ nhà rất thân thiện, phòng sạch sẽ yên tĩnh, an ninh tốt.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I stayed twice and both times were great, and there was a washing machine.

reviews.title: Phòng mới nên rất là ok luôn. Decor phòng 9,5 đỉm ạ, sạch sẽ thoáng mát, check in đc chục tấm trong phòng luôn. Check in
reviews.positives: Check in check out kiểu mới tự túc mình thích điều này

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The location is right in the center of Khuất Duy Tiến street. It is very convenient to travel to nearby areas, the room has an extremely beautiful view, super chill, with a spacious view and plenty of greenery, and easy for check-in.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Rất thoáng và sạch sẽ, nhân viên nhiệt tình. Rất đáng đồng tiền!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The bed smelled like someone had slept in it, very bad smell of body odour, I left in the morning and never went back.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 1 trải nghiệm tuyệt vời, sạch sẽ và thoáng mát, tôi chân thành rcm cho mọi người ! ! !

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: I booked the apartment 2 times during my short trip in Vietnam, and both apartments were clean and prepared perfectly. There is a small, fully equipped kitchen so you can cook for yourself and both times the bed was comfortable. If i had any problem or question, I could always text the owners and get a quick reply. The apartments were pretty spacious, too, and had small balconies to enjoy the morning coffee
reviews.negatives: The only small negative I can think of is that the room had to be paid in cash. It didn't bother me much because you need cash during travel anyway, but it can be a little inconvenient.
